---
name: "✨ Feature request"
about: Suggest a new feature or an improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

<!--
Thanks for the idea! Help us understand who it's for and the problem it solves.
If you plan to build this yourself, open this issue first, then reference it from
your pull request with "Closes #<this issue number>".
-->

## Who is this for?

<!-- Which users benefit? e.g. developers, students, researchers, everyone. -->

## What do we need?

<!-- Describe the feature or change. What should it let people do? -->

## Why do we need it? What problem does it solve?

<!-- The problem this solves and why it matters. Real examples help. -->

## How might it work? (optional)

<!-- A rough idea of the UX or approach, if you have one. -->

## Alternatives you've considered (optional)

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem. -->

## Before submitting

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I explained who it's for
- [ ] I explained what we need
- [ ] I explained why we need it (the problem it solves)
